response.justification: While the candidate brings 19 years of strong engineering experience and recent exposure to AI infrastructure through MCP frameworks at re:cinq, the role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI.' The candidate's background is primarily in web, infrastructure, and developer tooling rather than AI/ML domain expertise, and there is no evidence of strategic advising on AI adoption or driving AI-powered product differentiation—core responsibilities for this director-level position.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year experience requirement with diverse technical depth across multiple domains
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq shows movement into the space
Demonstrated ability to inspire and share knowledge through workshops, talks, and community engagement
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, deep learning background, or products/platforms built with AI
Limited evidence of strategic advising, customer partnership, or business-level impact on technology adoption
Background primarily in infrastructure, web, and developer tooling rather than AI/ML or cloud product strategy
